verses.text: He gives the twelve power over unclean spirits and names them, including 'Judas Iscariot, who also betrayed him.' The chosen band. Even among the twelve was one who would fall.
He gives the twelve power over unclean spirits and names them, including 'Judas Iscariot, who also betrayed him.' The chosen band. Even among the twelve was one who would fall.
He gives the twelve power over unclean spirits and names them, including 'Judas Iscariot, who also betrayed him.' The chosen band. Even among the twelve was one who would fall.
He gives the twelve power over unclean spirits and names them, including 'Judas Iscariot, who also betrayed him.' The chosen band. Even among the twelve was one who would fall.
He sends them first to 'the lost sheep of the house of Israel,' to preach the kingdom near. Ordered mission. The gospel comes first to Israel, then to the world.
He sends them first to 'the lost sheep of the house of Israel,' to preach the kingdom near. Ordered mission. The gospel comes first to Israel, then to the world.
He sends them first to 'the lost sheep of the house of Israel,' to preach the kingdom near. Ordered mission. The gospel comes first to Israel, then to the world.
Heal freely, 'freely ye have received, freely give'; take no provision, for 'the workman is worthy of his meat.' Trust and travel light. God provides for those who go in His name.
Heal freely, 'freely ye have received, freely give'; take no provision, for 'the workman is worthy of his meat.' Trust and travel light. God provides for those who go in His name.
Heal freely, 'freely ye have received, freely give'; take no provision, for 'the workman is worthy of his meat.' Trust and travel light. God provides for those who go in His name.
Find the worthy; if they receive you not, shake off the dust; 'more tolerable for... Sodom' than such. Solemn responsibility. To reject the gospel is graver than the sin of Sodom.
Find the worthy; if they receive you not, shake off the dust; 'more tolerable for... Sodom' than such. Solemn responsibility. To reject the gospel is graver than the sin of Sodom.
Find the worthy; if they receive you not, shake off the dust; 'more tolerable for... Sodom' than such. Solemn responsibility. To reject the gospel is graver than the sin of Sodom.
Find the worthy; if they receive you not, shake off the dust; 'more tolerable for... Sodom' than such. Solemn responsibility. To reject the gospel is graver than the sin of Sodom.
Find the worthy; if they receive you not, shake off the dust; 'more tolerable for... Sodom' than such. Solemn responsibility. To reject the gospel is graver than the sin of Sodom.
'I send you forth as sheep in the midst of wolves'; be 'wise as serpents, and harmless as doves.' Prudent meekness. Christ's servants need both caution and innocence.
'I send you forth as sheep in the midst of wolves'; be 'wise as serpents, and harmless as doves.' Prudent meekness. Christ's servants need both caution and innocence.
'I send you forth as sheep in the midst of wolves'; be 'wise as serpents, and harmless as doves.' Prudent meekness. Christ's servants need both caution and innocence.
When delivered up, take no thought what to say; 'it is... the Spirit of your Father which speaketh in you.' Promised help. God gives words to His witnesses in the hour of need.
When delivered up, take no thought what to say; 'it is... the Spirit of your Father which speaketh in you.' Promised help. God gives words to His witnesses in the hour of need.
Brother shall betray brother; ye shall be hated for His name; 'he that endureth to the end shall be saved.' Costly loyalty. Faithfulness to the end wins the crown.
Brother shall betray brother; ye shall be hated for His name; 'he that endureth to the end shall be saved.' Costly loyalty. Faithfulness to the end wins the crown.
Brother shall betray brother; ye shall be hated for His name; 'he that endureth to the end shall be saved.' Costly loyalty. Faithfulness to the end wins the crown.
The disciple is not above his master; if they called Him Beelzebub, much more His household. Sharing His reproach. The servant must expect the treatment his Lord received.
The disciple is not above his master; if they called Him Beelzebub, much more His household. Sharing His reproach. The servant must expect the treatment his Lord received.
Fear them not; rather 'fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in hell.' The right fear. Awe of God drives out the fear of man.
Fear them not; rather 'fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in hell.' The right fear. Awe of God drives out the fear of man.
Fear them not; rather 'fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in hell.' The right fear. Awe of God drives out the fear of man.
Not a sparrow falls without your Father; 'the very hairs of your head are... numbered'; fear not. Minute care. God's eye on the smallest assures us of His love.
Not a sparrow falls without your Father; 'the very hairs of your head are... numbered'; fear not. Minute care. God's eye on the smallest assures us of His love.
Not a sparrow falls without your Father; 'the very hairs of your head are... numbered'; fear not. Minute care. God's eye on the smallest assures us of His love.
Whoso confesses Christ before men, He will confess before His Father; whoso denies, He will deny. Open allegiance. To own Christ now is to be owned by Him then.
Whoso confesses Christ before men, He will confess before His Father; whoso denies, He will deny. Open allegiance. To own Christ now is to be owned by Him then.
He came to send 'not... peace, but a sword'; a man's foes may be his own household. Division for truth. Loyalty to Christ may cost the dearest earthly ties.
He came to send 'not... peace, but a sword'; a man's foes may be his own household. Division for truth. Loyalty to Christ may cost the dearest earthly ties.
He came to send 'not... peace, but a sword'; a man's foes may be his own household. Division for truth. Loyalty to Christ may cost the dearest earthly ties.
He that loves family above Christ is not worthy; 'he that loseth his life for my sake shall find it.' Surrender that saves. To give up all for Christ is to gain everything.
He that loves family above Christ is not worthy; 'he that loseth his life for my sake shall find it.' Surrender that saves. To give up all for Christ is to gain everything.
He that loves family above Christ is not worthy; 'he that loseth his life for my sake shall find it.' Surrender that saves. To give up all for Christ is to gain everything.
He that receives you receives Me; even 'a cup of cold water' to a disciple shall not lose its reward. Small kindness rewarded. God notes the least service done in His name.
He that receives you receives Me; even 'a cup of cold water' to a disciple shall not lose its reward. Small kindness rewarded. God notes the least service done in His name.
